CustomField.description: If Billing Call 2 Status is Complete, shows the number of days from the Billing Call 2 Date to the One Bill Sent Threshold Met Stamp date. (One_Bill_Sent_Threshold_Met_Stamp__c - Billing_Call_2_Date__c)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If Billing Call 2 Status is Complete, shows the number of days from the Billing Call 2 Date to the One Bill Sent Threshold Met Stamp date.
CustomField.label: Days Check In Call to 1 Bill Sent Stamp
